description.content: Global operations
Reset mappings to the default state and reset the request journal
Shutdown the WireMock server

The WireMock Admin REST API provides programmatic control over a running WireMock server instance. It supports creating, updating, and deleting stub mappings; querying the request journal; recording and replaying real API traffic; managing stateful scenarios; and performing system operations such as reset and shutdown. Available under the /__admin/ path prefix on any running WireMock instance.
